markdown_projection.note: JSON refinement is authority. Markdown projection is on-demand only and must not become an authority sidecar.

handoff_summary.REFINEMENT_CHECK: PASS_TARGETED_AND_SPEC: refinement.json parse ok; spec-enrichment-proposal.json parse ok; SPEC_CURRENT ok; spec-bundle-check ok; validator-spec-regression ok; spec-eof-appendices-check ok; signature token not persisted. REPO_WIDE_PACKET_PROJECTION_CHECK_BLOCKED_BY_PRE_EXISTING_WP-KERNEL-005_DRIFT.
NEW_FEATURES_OR_CAPABILITIES_DISCOVERED: ProjectKnowledgeIndex as the PostgreSQL/EventLedger-canonical source/entity/edge/span/claim/passage substrate
Handshake-native memory claim lifecycle and retrieval trace surfaces
Integrated Tiptap/ProseMirror rich document editor with Monaco code-node subsystem
Loom/Obsidian projection over canonical knowledge records
UserManual migration from legacy ModelManual naming
Backend navigation APIs and visual-debug surfaces for no-context model operation
MAJOR_TECH_UPGRADE_ADVICE: Promote WP-KERNEL-009 only after v02.192 reconciles stale SQLite-era Loom/search/workflow text with the active PostgreSQL/EventLedger no-SQLite law.
Keep Tiptap/ProseMirror and Monaco as bundled product libraries, not outside application dependencies.
Keep generated wiki pages, markdown, HTML, context bundles, and debug reports as projections over typed PostgreSQL/EventLedger records.
REVIEW_FOCUS: Confirm post-enrichment refinement approval before packet.json hydration, MT promotion, worktree creation, or coder launch.
Confirm the one-time signature token is consumed only at the final post-enrichment signature step.
Confirm the 240 draft microtasks are promoted as typed MT-*.json contracts only after the signed packet is hydrated.
Confirm no ACP will be used for this WP unless the operator explicitly changes that later.
handoff_summary.NEXT_ORCHESTRATOR_ACTION: Present refreshed refinement status to the operator and wait for post-enrichment refinement approval/signature before packet hydration.

refinement.operator_request: Start activation of WP-KERNEL-009 Project Knowledge Index Loom Rich Editor, refinement and enrichment phase; combined Orchestrator and Activation Manager; no ACP.
refinement.operator_signature_uniqueness_prewrite_c: PASS: rg -n exact token under .GOV returned no matches before this refinement was written.

scope_split.handshake_product: Define the product requirements for a Handshake-native ProjectKnowledgeIndex, memory claim lifecycle, Loom/Obsidian projection, rich editor, UserManual, backend navigation, visual debug, and validation evidence. No product code is edited in this phase.
scope_split.repo_governance: Move the active WP-KERNEL-009 stub into refinement/enrichment readiness while preserving JSON-first authority, no-ACP execution, signature one-time-use, and CX-405/CX-406 Master Spec proposal gates.

base_scope: Build a ProjectKnowledgeIndex that indexes selected project roots into canonical PostgreSQL/EventLedger records for sources, spans, entities, relationships, passages, claims, UserManual entries, retrieval traces, validation receipts, rich documents, and Loom blocks.
Replace sidecar project-brain/wiki authority with typed product records; generated markdown, wiki, HTML, debug, context-bundle, and export artifacts remain projections.
Integrate Tiptap/ProseMirror as the rich document model and Monaco as the embedded code-node subsystem inside Handshake, with CRDT/EventLedger promotion semantics.
Extend Loom into an Obsidian-like navigation and backlink surface over canonical records, not a separate vault.
Migrate legacy ModelManual naming and code paths to UserManual or mark compatibility shims explicitly.
Preserve folded legacy stub intent inside the WP-KERNEL-009 packet rather than reactivating older stubs separately.
gaps_closed_against_current_behavior: Avoids a Markdown/wiki sidecar becoming the hidden project-brain authority.
Prevents stale SQLite dual-backend assumptions from leaking into a new kernel product surface.
Turns scattered Loom, AI-ready, retrieval-mode, relationship_id, ContextPack recorder, and manual-surface ideas into one packet boundary.
Gives no-context local/cloud agents stable backend navigation, UserManual, trace, and receipt paths instead of relying on chat history.
Forces editor/schema/graph mutations through CRDT/EventLedger promotion instead of browser state or direct DB writes.

spec_conflicts_requiring_enrichment.summary: v02.191 contains current PostgreSQL/EventLedger no-SQLite law but still carries older SQLite-index/cache/local-first language in touched Loom, search, workflow, and Shadow Workspace areas.
spec_conflicts_requiring_enrichment.enrichment_need: Add or update Master Spec clauses that make PostgreSQL/EventLedger the WP-KERNEL-009 authority path and classify SQLite mentions as stale legacy product debt where they intersect kernel authority.

spec_conflicts_requiring_enrichment.summary: The product still has ModelManual naming while current operator/global build policy requires UserManual as the no-context model and operator manual surface.
spec_conflicts_requiring_enrichment.enrichment_need: Specify UserManual as the canonical product surface and require explicit compatibility shims or migration rows for legacy ModelManual paths.

anchors: 2.3.13.11 Project Knowledge Index and Rich Document Authority [ADD v02.192]

Tiptap/ProseMirror plus Monaco rich editor stack locked as bundled Handshake product libraries with visual-debug and backend-navigation requirements.

Imported Loom SQLite compatibility/fallback language superseded for WP-KERNEL-009 authority paths.

approved_spec_enrichment.result: Primitive and interaction appendix rows registered for knowledge, retrieval, rich document, backend navigation, visual debug, and UserManual surfaces.

proposed_spec_enrichment: Create copy-first bundle master-spec-v02.192 after CX-405/CX-406 confirmation.

Patch 02-system-architecture to define ProjectKnowledgeIndex, KnowledgeSource, KnowledgeSpan, KnowledgeEntity, KnowledgeEdge, KnowledgeClaim, MemoryPassage, RetrievalTrace, and UserManualRecord as PostgreSQL/EventLedger authority records.
Patch 02-system-architecture and 11-shared-dev-platform-and-oss-foundations so Loom storage/search/graph text no longer implies SQLite compatibility or fallback for WP-KERNEL-009 authority.

Patch 07-user-experience-and-development and 10-product-surfaces to lock Tiptap/ProseMirror plus Monaco as the built-in Handshake rich editor stack and to define the UserManual operator/model surface.

Patch 12-end-of-file-appendices to add primitive registry and interaction-matrix entries for ProjectKnowledgeIndex, KnowledgeSource, KnowledgeSpan, KnowledgeEntity, KnowledgeEdge, KnowledgeClaim, MemoryPassage, RichDocument, EditorCodeNode, UserManual, BackendNavigation, RetrievalTrace, and VisualDebugEvidence.

microtask_plan.promotion_rule: Promote to official MT-*.json contracts only after the Master Spec enrichment is applied, the refreshed refinement declares ENRICHMENT_NEEDED=NO, and packet.json is hydrated.

high_roi_additions.what: Add a stale-spec tripwire for SQLite-era wording in WP-KERNEL-009 touched modules.
high_roi_additions.why_high_roi: The area is already blocked on spec enrichment, and this prevents future MTs from reintroducing obsolete storage assumptions.
high_roi_additions.gap_or_risk_addressed: SQLite fallback or test-fixture authority could silently undercut PostgreSQL/EventLedger proof.
high_roi_additions.reuse: Existing no-SQLite tripwire, validator-spec-regression, and grep-based checks.
high_roi_additions.validation: A negative fixture containing SQLite authority language in touched WP-KERNEL-009 sections must fail the enrichment check.

high_roi_additions.what: Add UserManual self-consistency rows for every new backend navigation, rich editor, Loom, and retrieval trace command.
high_roi_additions.why_high_roi: The WP already changes model-facing navigation; same-pass manual wiring avoids later no-context recovery drift.
high_roi_additions.gap_or_risk_addressed: Local/cloud agents cannot recover work after compaction if the manual trails product routes.
high_roi_additions.reuse: Existing model_manual Rust source, manual_no_context_harness, model_manual_tests, and HBR-MAN rules.
high_roi_additions.validation: Manual self-consistency test proves every named command/API/schema field resolves to product code.

high_roi_additions.what: Add visual-debug evidence fixtures for editor schema, graph navigation, retrieval trace, UserManual, and error states.
high_roi_additions.why_high_roi: WP-KERNEL-009 is UI-heavy; visual checks added now reduce downstream reviewer ambiguity.
high_roi_additions.gap_or_risk_addressed: Unit tests could pass while the rich editor, graph, or manual is unreadable or undiscoverable.
high_roi_additions.reuse: Existing VisualDebuggerPanel, tauri visual_debug command paths, tests/visual, and HBR-VIS rules.
high_roi_additions.validation: Headless visual run captures screenshots and structured state for each new operator-facing surface.

high_roi_additions.what: Add typed BackendNavigation receipts for model actions in the knowledge index and rich editor.
high_roi_additions.why_high_roi: The WP explicitly supports parallel local/cloud models; typed receipts are cheap while API contracts are being defined.
high_roi_additions.gap_or_risk_addressed: Parallel models could collide, lose attribution, or require screen-reading to coordinate.
high_roi_additions.reuse: Existing inspector_read, trace_projection, replay_drive, EventLedger, and role mailbox patterns.
high_roi_additions.validation: Two-session test proves actions carry actor/session/correlation IDs and can be replayed without prose parsing.

acceptance_criteria.text: WP-KERNEL-009 stayed blocked from packet/signature/worktree/coder launch while ENRICHMENT_NEEDED=YES; after v02.192 enrichment, packet hydration remains blocked until post-enrichment refinement signature.
The copy-first v02.192 indexed bundle exists with manifest hashes, changelog, SPEC_CURRENT update, BUILD_ORDER sync, and passing spec validation commands.
The exact one-time signature token is not stored before the valid post-enrichment signature step.
The six folded legacy stubs remain preserved in WP-KERNEL-009 and are not reactivated directly.
The 240 draft microtasks are treated as source input until promoted to official typed MT contracts after enrichment refresh.
Post-enrichment packet hydration, MT promotion, worktree creation, and coder launch require a final operator refinement approval/signature and remain unstarted in this phase.

risks_and_hardening.risk: Generated wiki or markdown becomes hidden authority.
failure_scenarios: A model edits exported markdown instead of canonical records.
Validator checks a context bundle but not the EventLedger source.
mitigations: Declare all generated wiki/markdown/context/debug artifacts as projections.
Require EventLedger/PostgreSQL source links and replay tests for every authority claim.
verification: Projection edit negative test fails to mutate canonical knowledge records.
Replay reconstructs the same knowledge graph from EventLedger state.

risks_and_hardening.risk: Rich editor schema churn corrupts documents or code blocks.
failure_scenarios: Tiptap schema migration drops Monaco code-node metadata.
AI edit proposal writes directly to a document without promotion.
mitigations: Version rich document schema and code-node payloads.
Route AI edit proposals through CRDT/EventLedger promotion and review.
verification: Round-trip fixture covers rich text, embeds, links, code nodes, and AI proposal rejection.
Promotion negative test blocks direct document mutation.

risks_and_hardening.risk: Knowledge graph relationships are invented or unstable.
failure_scenarios: Extractor creates relationship edges without source spans.
relationship_id changes between re-index runs and breaks retrieval traces.
mitigations: Every edge requires source span, extractor version, confidence, and lifecycle.
Stable relationship_id derivation is a packet acceptance row.
verification: Unsupported inferred edge emits a blocked/proposed claim, not authority.

risks_and_hardening.risk: Spec enrichment expands beyond the activation closure unit.
failure_scenarios: v02.192 becomes a broad cleanup of all SQLite text instead of WP-KERNEL-009 touched areas.
Spec proposal edits unrelated product domains.
mitigations: Patch only modules and clauses listed in spec-enrichment-proposal.json.
Leave unrelated legacy SQLite surfaces as classified debt unless they intersect WP-KERNEL-009 authority.
verification: Changelog lists only touched modules and before/after hashes.
Diff review confirms no unrelated roadmap or product-surface rewrite.

verification_plan: Parse refinement.json and spec-enrichment-proposal.json as JSON.
Run packet-contract-projection-check to prove JSON-first projection opt-out is accepted.
Run validator-spec-regression and spec-eof-appendices-check after the v02.192 enrichment is approved and applied.
Run hbr-matrix-check after packet hydration emits HBR rows.
Run product tests and visual-debug checks only after a product implementation packet/worktree exists.
refinement.next_action: Await post-enrichment refinement approval/signature. After approval, hydrate packet.json and promote MT-*.json contracts from the 240 draft microtasks; ACP remains disabled by operator request.

spec_enrichment_result.approval_evidence: Operator chat approval: APPROVE SPEC PROPOSAL WP-KERNEL-009 v02.192

Required validator anchors resolve against v02.192.
Appendix machine-readable spec_version/path projections resolve against v02.192.
Repo-wide generated projection drift remains in WP-KERNEL-005 MT/packet/refinement projections; no WP-KERNEL-009 packet or MT projections exist yet.

verification_results.notes: spec-debt-registry, spec-eof-appendices, spec-growth-discipline, and spec-governance-reference checks passed.
Required validator anchors resolve against v02.192.
Appendix machine-readable spec_version/path projections resolve against v02.192.
Repo-wide generated projection drift remains in WP-KERNEL-005 MT/packet/refinement projections; no WP-KERNEL-009 packet or MT projections exist yet.

risks: ProjectKnowledgeIndex becomes a second database instead of an authority schema inside PostgreSQL/EventLedger.
Loom/Obsidian projection becomes a markdown vault by accident.
Tiptap and Monaco integration ships UI affordances without replayable product authority.
UserManual migration breaks existing model_manual routes without compatibility receipts.
The signature-like token is consumed before enrichment refresh makes signature capture valid.
minimum_controls: ENRICHMENT_NEEDED may be NO only because v02.192 is applied and checked; final packet hydration still requires post-enrichment refinement signature.
Do not write the exact signature token to repo files before the final signature gate.
Require typed PostgreSQL/EventLedger source records for all knowledge authority.
Require visual-debug and UserManual evidence for all operator/model-facing surfaces.
Keep folded legacy stubs inactive and preserved inside WP-KERNEL-009.
